_comment: Offline fixture for the GAP-1 probe (TDD §3.3). Recorded/guarded custom_fields array shape for the live canary b167331c-536f-4996-9b2d-2f696f35f556. Used by --mode=offline + CI; carries a populated Asset ID so the offline dry-run is a faithful CONFIRMED-shape rehearsal of the assess_custom_fields logic. This is NOT the live verdict — the live verdict is settled only by the operator-fired --mode=live run (TDD §3.6).
